children.text: such program otherwise meets the requirements of this chapter and the requirements of the applicable program;
such program serves the same individuals that are served under this chapter;
such program provides services in a coordinated manner with services provided under this chapter; and
such funds are used to supplement, and not supplant, funds provided from non-Federal sources.
Chapters 2 and 3 of subtitle B of title I of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act [ et seq., 3171 et seq.].29 U.S.C. 3161
The Wagner-Peyser Act [ et seq.].29 U.S.C. 49

children.heading: Use of funds as matching funds
children.label: c Use of funds as matching funds
children.text: For the purposes of this section, the term “additional funds” does not include funds used as matching funds.
